name: AI prompt generator: create optimized prompts for any task
description: Takes a rough task description, uses Claude AI to generate an optimized, structured prompt with clear instructions, examples, and output format. Posts the generated prompt to Slack with Block Kit formatting for easy copy-paste.

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the generated prompt

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the prompt

taskDescription.description: Rough description of the task you need a prompt for (e.g. 'Write product descriptions for an e-commerce site', 'Analyze customer reviews for sentiment')

targetModel.description: Target AI model: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, general

outputFormat.description: Desired output format: structured (JSON), narrative (text), code, mixed

additionalRequirements.description: Additional requirements or constraints for the prompt (e.g. 'must be under 500 tokens', 'include few-shot examples')

steps.name: Run Claude AI to generate the optimized prompt
Build Slack Block Kit message with generated prompt
